name: Meteor Hammer
description: An enchanted hammer forged of metals discovered in the ruins of a village destroyed by a great star storm.

abilities.name: Meteor Hammer
abilities.description: After a successful channel, summons a meteor that strikes down at the target area after a delay, stunning enemies and dealing impact damage. Slows movement speed and continues to deal damage over time to enemy units for a while. Cooldown: 24. Mana Cost: 75. Cast Range: 600. Impact Radius: 400. Impact Damage: 130. Damage per Second: 50. The meteor impact affects buildings as well, stunning and burning them. Buildings take less impact damage.
